_provenance: schema-derived — tests runtime change of EXECUTION_START_TIME per AC-V2.2. All time strings are named-constant labels, not producer-computed values.
description: Grace window shifts when EXECUTION_START_TIME changes at runtime

cases.label: custom_start_10_00_inside_grace
cases.note: 10:10 is 10 min after 10:00 — inside shifted grace window

cases.label: default_start_at_exact_open
cases.note: At EXECUTION_START_TIME itself — 0 min elapsed, inside grace
